steps.title: Combine the conversion factors
steps.content: $1$ furlong is $220$ yards, and each yard is $3$ feet. So $$1\text{ furlong}=220\cdot3=660\text{ feet}.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: A distance of $58$ furlongs is 38280 feet. The furlongs cancel after the first conversion and yards cancel after the second, leaving feet as the final unit.
